assetCatalogue.title: Asset Catalogue
assetCatalogue.emptyFirst: No equipment models yet. Use the Add button above to catalog a reusable appliance or fixture model.
assetCatalogue.emptySearch: No models match your search. Try adjusting filters.

statusBanner.allMapped: All {{count}} categories are connected to Swiss law
statusBanner.allMappedDesc: When a tenant submits a maintenance request, the legal engine will automatically look up depreciation standards and rent reduction rules for every category.
statusBanner.unmapped_one: {{unmapped}} of {{total}} category isn’t connected to Swiss law yet
statusBanner.unmapped_other: {{unmapped}} of {{total}} categories aren’t connected to Swiss law yet
statusBanner.unmappedDesc: The legal engine can’t find depreciation standards or rent reduction rules for unmapped categories. Scroll down to set them up.

howItWorks.title: What does a mapping do?
howItWorks.description: Each mapping connects a maintenance category (what the tenant sees) to a legal topic (what the engine searches). When a tenant reports an issue — say, a broken dishwasher — the engine uses the mapping to find two things:
howItWorks.deprecDesc: How old is the item and what’s its expected lifespan? This determines who pays for repairs — the tenant or the landlord.
howItWorks.rentDesc: Is the tenant entitled to a rent reduction while the issue isn’t fixed? Swiss law defines specific percentages per defect type.

card.notConnected: Not connected — the engine can’t look up legal references for this category yet.
card.resetTitle: Remove your override and use the system default
card.editTitle: Change the legal topic for this category
card.activeTitle: Active — the engine uses this mapping. Click to disable.
card.inactiveTitle: Disabled — the engine skips this mapping. Click to re-enable.
card.changeHint: Change what the engine searches when a tenant reports a “{{label}}” issue:
card.checkHint: When a tenant reports a {{label}} issue, the engine checks:

deprecBox.title: Depreciation
deprecBox.whoPaysSub: → Determines who pays: landlord (if past lifespan) or shared cost
deprecBox.noData: No depreciation data for this topic. Cost-sharing can’t be calculated automatically.

rentBox.title: Rent Reduction
rentBox.claimSub: → Tells you if the tenant can claim a rent reduction while unfixed
rentBox.noRules: No specific rent reduction rules. The tenant can’t auto-claim a reduction for this type.

categoryMappings.empty: No categories found yet. Once tenants start submitting maintenance requests, their categories will appear here.
